title: fix(apps): restore tomdacatto AI video generator to APPS.md
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Replanting a lost flower
gist.blurb: We accidentally pruned tomdacatto's AI video generator from the app showcase during some maintenance, but it's back! The app is restored, and so is their well-deserved Flower status.
gist.summary: Restored tomdacatto's AI video generator to the community app showcase after it was inadvertently dropped during a file rebuild.
gist.impact: The app is once again visible in the community directory, and the creator's contributor tier has been correctly restored to Flower.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee replanting a flower (representing the Flower tier and the app) into a lime green pot, with a small video camera or film strip nearby to represent the video generator app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot carefully replanting a glowing pink pixel flower into a lime green (#ecf874) pot. A tiny retro video camera sits next to the pot. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot carefully replanting a glowing pink pixel flower into a lime green (#ecf874) pot. A tiny retro video camera sits next to the pot. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
